Abs_X83_Bosch8.1_V3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 740
Recv ID: 760
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS

        "firstbyte": 7
      },

        "firstbyte": 6
      }
    }
  },
